_protocol: Detector = llama3.1:8b (structured+gated prompt), MAPPER = Claude (hand re-map of results_raw.json). Same convention as freeform handmap.

P1-research-market.notes: llama talked itself OUT of every risk ('No risk present' on join, parallel, schema) and concluded the plan was clean - on a plan with 4 real issues. 0 catches.

P2-research-policy.notes: Misapplied silent-collapse to s5 (inputs aren't overlapping) = 1 FP. Explicitly DENIED the verify-starvation ('No risk present') and the latent dependency ('no latent dependencies'). 0 real catches.

P3-coding-refactor.notes: All 4 are FPs vs GT: flagged provenance/confidence on code diffs (gating should suppress), a join-collapse, and RUNAWAY despite follow_up disabled (self-contradictory). Missed all 3 real GT items.

P4-research-news.notes: Real catches: join silent-collapse (CONFLICT) and unbounded follow-up (RUNAWAY) = 2/3. NOPROV/NOCONF are FPs. Missed T5. NOTE: the llama auto-mapper scored this 0/3 - the strong mapper rescued 2 real catches.

P5-research-wellformed.notes: CONTROL PLAN. False-alarmed: silent-collapse at s4 (handling present) and a latent dependency between independent laptops s1/s2. 2 FPs. (Did correctly NOT flag provenance/confidence here.)

P6-coding-needle.notes: Caught the needle (s1/s2 coordination = LATENTDEP). NOPROV/NOCONF on code = 2 FPs. Missed C1-DROP.
